businesses with ugly AI menu redesigns!!!

20 Jul, 2026

I stopped by a Filipino and Hawaiian restaurant that was recommended to me a few months ago. One of my friends had gone many times before and said they enjoyed the menu.

We looked up the menu before heading over. As a Filipino-American I always get curious about Filipino restaurants because a lot of our dishes are family-style comfort food.

To our disappointment, the restaurant revamped their menu with AI. I would rather read a whole menu in Comic Sans, Papyrus, or Curlz MT than this generated artwork.
